name: Marcos Solomon
tagline: Designing secure, scalable systems that businesses can rely on.
bio: Leads system architecture and visual brand through graphic design.
story: Marcos Solomon leads the system architecture and security engineering at Brivemarc Technologies. His work focuses on designing scalable backend systems that can handle real-world demand while maintaining strict security standards. He has built and structured systems from the ground up, ensuring that every layer, from database design to API architecture is optimized for performance and resilience. Marcos approaches every project with a security-first mindset, integrating best practices early rather than treating security as an afterthought. Beyond infrastructure, he plays a key role in shaping how systems evolve over time, ensuring they remain maintainable, scalable, and aligned with business growth. His philosophy is simple: systems should not just work, they should remain reliable, secure, and scalable under pressure.
notableWork: Designed scalable backend for Solora Market system
Implemented security layer reducing vulnerabilities by 97%
philosophy: Good systems are not just built to function, they are designed to withstand growth, failure, and attack without compromise.

name: Evans Kariuki
tagline: Building connected systems that bridge software and real-world devices.
bio: Develops fullstack applications and IoT systems that power real-time, scalable digital solutions.
story: Evans Kariuki is responsible for building and integrating fullstack systems that drive real-world functionality at Brivemarc Technologies. His work sits at the intersection of software engineering and hardware integration, where he develops applications that not only function digitally but also interact with physical devices. He specializes in developing robust backend systems using Node.js and Express, paired with responsive frontends built in React. His approach focuses on performance, scalability, and seamless user experience across platforms. Beyond traditional software, Evans extends systems into the physical world through IoT, enabling automation, remote control, and real-time data processing. From designing APIs and managing databases to integrating microcontrollers and sensor-driven systems, he ensures that every component communicates efficiently and reliably. His work enables businesses to move beyond static systems into intelligent, automated environments. Evans believes that technology should not just solve problems on screen, but should actively interact with the real world, creating systems that are both practical and impactful.
notableWork: Developed IoT-based smart control system with real-time device communication
Built scalable fullstack applications using MERN architecture
Integrated hardware systems with cloud-based dashboards for monitoring and control
philosophy: Technology should go beyond the screen and actively interact with the real world to solve meaningful problems.

name: Muola Veronica
tagline: Crafting intuitive digital experiences built on trust, usability, and security.
bio: Leads product design and user experience while ensuring systems remain secure, intuitive, and user-focused.
story: Muola Veronica leads the design and user experience strategy at Brivemarc Technologies, ensuring that every product is not only visually compelling but also intuitive, accessible, and secure. Her work bridges the gap between design and functionality, focusing on how users interact with systems and how those systems earn user trust. She approaches design as more than aesthetics, treating it as a structured process that influences usability, engagement, and conversion. From wireframing and prototyping to final interface design, Muola ensures that every detail aligns with both user expectations and business goals. In addition to design, she plays a critical role in cybersecurity, ensuring that user-facing systems are built with security in mind. She focuses on protecting user data, improving trust signals within interfaces, and ensuring that security measures do not compromise user experience. Her ability to combine design thinking with security awareness allows her to create products that are not only beautiful and easy to use but also reliable and trustworthy. Muola believes that great design is not just seen, it is experienced, and that trust is a core part of that experience.
responsibilities: UI/UX design and product experience strategy
User journey optimization and usability improvements
notableWork: Designed user interfaces for multiple web and mobile applications
Improved usability and user flow across client platforms
Integrated security-focused design practices into user experiences
philosophy: Design is not just how something looks, but how it works, how it feels, and how much users trust it.

name: Brighton Wandera
role: Mobile Developer, Full Stack Engineer & AI Integration Specialist
tagline: Building intelligent applications that merge performance, usability, and real-world impact.
bio: Builds cross-platform mobile apps, full stack web systems, and intelligent interfaces powered by AI.
story: Brighton Wandera is a Software Engineer specializing in mobile and full stack development at Brivemarc Technologies. He builds cross platform mobile applications and end to end web systems that are fast, scalable, and user focused. His work spans from Android and Flutter-based apps to backend integrations and AI-powered features. Brighton takes a practical, performance first approach to development, ensuring every product he ships is not just functional, but refined and ready for real world use. His background in Software Engineering gives him a strong foundation across the full development stack, from UI design to system architecture.
responsibilities: AI feature integration in user interfaces
notableWork: Built responsive dashboards for IoT systems
Integrated AI-driven features into mobile interfaces
philosophy: Technology should not just function, it should adapt, respond, and improve the way people interact with systems.
